specific_change.target: Implement predictive auto-scaling on compute (scale out at cpu_p95 > 65, max 14 instances). Add 2 read replicas with read/write splitting on database. Raise connection pool limit from 150 to 300.
specific_change.produced: Replace the step-based auto-scaling policy with predictive auto-scaling that triggers scale-out at cpu_p95 > 65% and raise the ASG max from 12 to 14. Simultaneously, add 2 read replicas to the databas
